triggers.name: Enemy timer: Affliction
triggers.comments: ~1m24s at level 50 (formula 10, cap 14 ticks); class-defining DoT; the engine rescales to the profile's level; Shaman level 19. v1 keys enemy timers by spell name only — two mobs under the same spell share one bar.

triggers.name: Enemy timer cleared: Affliction
triggers.pattern: ^Your Affliction(?: (?P<rank>[IVXLCDM]+))? spell has worn off(?: of (.+))?\.$
triggers.comments: Cancels the cast-start countdown early (mez break, mob death) and re-announces on the overlay. Overlay text only — curated packs own the spoken wear-offs.
